title: Brown chicken

html:
BROWN CHICKEN

 

INGREDIENTS

  • 8 chicken portions
  • Salt and pepper
  • 1 onion sliced into rings
  • 250 ml mayonnaise
  • 250 ml chutney
  • 250 ml milk
  • 1 packet mushroom, creamy chicken or white onion soup
  • salt and pepper to taste

 

METHOD

  • Slice the onions into rings and place at the bottom of an oven dish
  • Place the chicken portions on the onions and season with salt and pepper to taste.
  • Sprinkle the soup powder over the chicken pieces.
  • Mix the rest of the ingredients and pour over the chicken.
  • Cover it with tinfoil.
  • Bake it for 40 minutes covered at 180C and then uncovered for 20 minutes at the same temperature until the chicken is a nice golden brown.
